title: Regularity Blow-Up Dichotomy as EML-4 Gap

analysis.object: T564: Regularity Blow-Up Dichotomy as EML-4 Gap depth analysis

dichotomy.description: Regularity/blow-up is binary: either always smooth (EML-3) or sometimes explodes (EML-inf)
dichotomy.reason: No middle ground: EML-4 does not exist; jump from EML-3 to EML-inf is the gap

eml4_nonexistence.description: EML-4 is not in the hierarchy {0,1,2,3,inf}; there is no EML-4 behavior
eml4_nonexistence.reason: Regularity/blow-up dichotomy is EML-4 gap theorem: nothing between EML-3 and EML-inf

binary_forced.description: The dichotomy is forced by EML hierarchy: EML-3 (regular) or EML-inf (blow-up), nothing between
binary_forced.reason: Binary dichotomy is theorem: EML depth has no EML-4 intermediate state

analysis.theorem: T564: Regularity Blow-Up Dichotomy as EML-4 Gap (S843).

key_theorem: T564: Regularity Blow-Up Dichotomy as EML-4 Gap (S843).
